servers.name: context7
servers.description: Up-to-date code documentation and examples for LLMs.
servers.author: Upstash
servers.configMcpod:
metadata:
  name: context7
  description: "Up-to-date code documentation and examples for LLMs."
  version: "1.0.0"
  author: "Upstash"
image: node:22-alpine
command: ["npx", "-y", "@upstash/context7-mcp"]
transport: stdio
environment: {}
permissions:
  network:
    outbound: true
    allow:
      - "registry.npmjs.org"
      - "context7.com"
      - "*.context7.com"
  filesystem: []
  compute:
    cpus: 1
    memory: 512m
restart: "no"

servers.name: sequential-thinking
servers.description: Structured, step-by-step reasoning as an MCP tool.
servers.author: Anthropic, PBC
servers.configMcpod:
metadata:
  name: sequential-thinking
  description: "Structured, step-by-step reasoning as an MCP tool."
  version: "0.6.2"
  author: "Anthropic, PBC"
image: node:22-alpine
command: ["npx", "-y", "@modelcontextprotocol/server-sequential-thinking"]
transport: stdio
environment: {}
permissions:
  network:
    outbound: true
    allow:
      - "registry.npmjs.org"
  filesystem: []
  compute:
    cpus: 1
    memory: 256m
restart: "no"

servers.name: memory
servers.author: Anthropic, PBC
servers.configMcpod:
metadata:
  name: memory
  description: "Persistent knowledge-graph memory for LLMs."
  version: "0.6.3"
  author: "Anthropic, PBC"
image: node:22-alpine
command: ["npx", "-y", "@modelcontextprotocol/server-memory"]
transport: stdio
environment: 
  MEMORY_FILE_PATH: /data/memory.json
permissions:
  network:
    outbound: true
    allow:
      - "registry.npmjs.org"
  filesystem: []
  compute:
    cpus: 1
    memory: 256m
restart: "no"

servers.name: everything
servers.description: Reference MCP server exercising prompts, tools, and resources.
servers.author: Anthropic, PBC
servers.configMcpod:
metadata:
  name: everything
  description: "Reference MCP server exercising prompts, tools, and resources."
  version: "0.6.2"
  author: "Anthropic, PBC"
image: node:22-alpine
command: ["npx", "-y", "@modelcontextprotocol/server-everything"]
transport: stdio
environment: {}
permissions:
  network:
    outbound: true
    allow:
      - "registry.npmjs.org"
  filesystem: []
  compute:
    cpus: 1
    memory: 256m
restart: "no"

servers.name: filesystem
servers.description: Read and write files in directories you explicitly grant.
servers.author: Anthropic, PBC
servers.configMcpod:
metadata:
  name: filesystem
  description: "Read and write files in directories you explicitly grant."
  version: "0.6.2"
  author: "Anthropic, PBC"
image: node:22-alpine
command: ["npx", "-y", "@modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem", "/workspace"]
transport: stdio
environment: {}
permissions:
  network:
    outbound: true
    allow:
      - "registry.npmjs.org"
  filesystem: []
  compute:
    cpus: 1
    memory: 256m
restart: "no"
